{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "cell-0",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# ObsPy 連携による地震データ解析\n",
    "\n",
    "[![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/tatsuki-washimi/gwexpy/blob/main/docs/web/en/user_guide/tutorials/case_seismic_obspy.ipynb)\n",
    "\n",
    "このチュートリアルでは **MiniSEED / SAC / FDSN** 形式の地震データを読み込み、gwexpy で解析する方法と、`obspy` ↔ gwexpy 間の双方向変換を解説します。\n",
    "\n",
    "## 重力波検出器科学での用途\n",
    "- KAGRA・LIGO・Virgo 環境モニターの地震計データ読み込み\n",
    "- 地震ノイズ解析と検出器感度へのカップリング\n",
    "- 地震チャンネルと重力波データのクロス相関\n",
    "\n",
    "**レガシーコード移行メモ:**  \n",
    "`obspy.read()` で読み込んで手動で numpy 処理していたコードは、  \n",
    "`TimeSeries.read(format='miniseed')` + gwexpy の高レベル API に置き換えられます。  \n",
    "[API_MAPPING.md Category 4](../../../../../docs_internal/references/SampleCodes_GWpy/API_MAPPING.md) の interop リファレンスも参照してください。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "cell-1",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-05T13:13:56.472781Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-05T13:13:56.472605Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-05T13:13:58.829698Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-05T13:13:58.829059Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "ObsPy バージョン: 1.4.2\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "from astropy import units as u\n",
    "\n",
    "from gwexpy.timeseries import TimeSeries, TimeSeriesDict\n",
    "\n",
    "try:\n",
    "    import obspy\n",
    "    OBSPY_AVAILABLE = True\n",
    "    print(f\"ObsPy バージョン: {obspy.__version__}\")\n",
    "except ImportError:\n",
    "    OBSPY_AVAILABLE = False\n",
    "    print(\"ObsPy がインストールされていません。pip install obspy でインストールしてください。\")\n",
    "    print(\"このチュートリアルでは API の紹介のみ行い、obspy が必要なセルはスキップします。\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "cell-2",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 1. ルート 1: `TimeSeries.read(format='miniseed')`\n",
    "\n",
    "gwexpy の I/O レイヤーは MiniSEED ファイルを直接読み込み、正しい単位と時間軸を持つ `TimeSeries` を返します。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "cell-3",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-05T13:13:58.832823Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-05T13:13:58.832407Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-05T13:13:58.835841Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-05T13:13:58.834971Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "ルート 1: TimeSeries.read(format='miniseed') または format='sac'\n",
      "GPS 時間軸・単位・チャンネル名を持つ TimeSeries が返されます。\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# --- ルート 1: gwexpy I/O 経由で MiniSEED を直接読み込み ---\n",
    "# 実際のファイルパスに置き換えてください:\n",
    "#\n",
    "# ts_seismic = TimeSeries.read(\n",
    "#     \"path/to/seismic.mseed\",\n",
    "#     format='miniseed',\n",
    "# )\n",
    "#\n",
    "# SAC 形式:\n",
    "# ts_seismic = TimeSeries.read(\"path/to/seismic.sac\", format='sac')\n",
    "#\n",
    "# FDSN ウェブサービス（ネットワーク接続が必要）:\n",
    "# ts_seismic = TimeSeries.read(\n",
    "#     \"IU.ANMO.00.BHZ\",\n",
    "#     format='miniseed',\n",
    "#     start=1234567890,\n",
    "#     end=1234568090,\n",
    "# )\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"ルート 1: TimeSeries.read(format='miniseed') または format='sac'\")\n",
    "print(\"GPS 時間軸・単位・チャンネル名を持つ TimeSeries が返されます。\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "cell-4",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 2. ルート 2: `from_obspy_trace()` – obspy オブジェクトから変換\n",
    "\n",
    "すでに `obspy.Trace` / `obspy.Stream` がある場合は `from_obspy_trace()` で gwexpy に変換します。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "cell-5",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-05T13:13:58.838878Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-05T13:13:58.838752Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-05T13:13:58.896985Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-05T13:13:58.896185Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "obspy Trace: K1.KAGRA.00.BHZ | 2023-01-01T00:00:00.000000Z - 2023-01-01T00:00:59.990000Z | 100.0 Hz, 6000 samples\n",
      "t0=1356566418.000 s, dt=0.01 s, N=6000, unit=m / s\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "if OBSPY_AVAILABLE:\n",
    "    rng = np.random.default_rng(0)\n",
    "    fs_seis = 100.0\n",
    "    n_seis  = 6000\n",
    "    t_seis  = np.arange(n_seis) / fs_seis\n",
    "\n",
    "    # 地震ノイズのシミュレーション\n",
    "    seis_data = (\n",
    "        1e-7 * rng.normal(0, 1, n_seis)\n",
    "        + 5e-7 * np.sin(2 * np.pi * 0.15 * t_seis)  # 0.15 Hz マイクロセイズム\n",
    "        + 2e-7 * np.sin(2 * np.pi * 1.0  * t_seis)  # 1 Hz ノイズ\n",
    "    )\n",
    "\n",
    "    stats = obspy.core.Stats()\n",
    "    stats.network  = \"K1\"\n",
    "    stats.station  = \"KAGRA\"\n",
    "    stats.location = \"00\"\n",
    "    stats.channel  = \"BHZ\"\n",
    "    stats.sampling_rate = fs_seis\n",
    "    stats.starttime = obspy.UTCDateTime(\"2023-01-01T00:00:00\")\n",
    "    stats.npts = n_seis\n",
    "\n",
    "    tr = obspy.Trace(data=seis_data, header=stats)\n",
    "    print(\"obspy Trace:\", tr)\n",
    "\n",
    "    # gwexpy TimeSeries に変換\n",
    "    ts_seismic = TimeSeries.from_obspy_trace(tr, unit=u.m / u.s)\n",
    "    print(f\"\\nt0={ts_seismic.t0:.3f}, dt={ts_seismic.dt}, N={len(ts_seismic.value)}, unit={ts_seismic.unit}\")\n",
    "else:\n",
    "    # obspy なしのフォールバック\n",
    "    rng = np.random.default_rng(0)\n",
    "    fs_seis = 100.0\n",
    "    n_seis  = 6000\n",
    "    t_seis  = np.arange(n_seis) / fs_seis\n",
    "    seis_data = (\n",
    "        1e-7 * rng.normal(0, 1, n_seis)\n",
    "        + 5e-7 * np.sin(2 * np.pi * 0.15 * t_seis)\n",
    "        + 2e-7 * np.sin(2 * np.pi * 1.0  * t_seis)\n",
    "    )\n",
    "    ts_seismic = TimeSeries(\n",
    "        seis_data, dt=(1/fs_seis)*u.s, t0=0*u.s,\n",
    "        unit=u.m/u.s, name=\"K1:KAGRA.BHZ\",\n",
    "    )\n",
    "    print(\"合成 TimeSeries を作成しました（obspy なし）\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "cell-6",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 3. 地震データの信号処理"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "cell-7",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-05T13:13:58.899739Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-05T13:13:58.899609Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-05T13:14:04.726058Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-05T13:14:04.725015Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Plot size 1200x600 with 1 Axes>\n"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "ts_seismic.plot(xscale='seconds');"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "cell-8",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-05T13:14:04.729805Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-05T13:14:04.729650Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-05T13:14:05.110605Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-05T13:14:05.110024Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1000x800 with 3 Axes>\n"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# 帯域フィルタリング\n",
    "ts_lf = ts_seismic.bandpass(0.05, 0.5)   # 0.05–0.5 Hz: 地球の固有振動 + マイクロセイズム\n",
    "ts_hf = ts_seismic.bandpass(1.0,  10.0)  # 1–10 Hz: 人工ノイズ帯\n",
    "\n",
    "fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 1, figsize=(10, 8), sharex=True)\n",
    "axes[0].plot(np.arange(len(ts_seismic.value)) / fs_seis, ts_seismic.value, lw=0.5, label=\"Raw\")\n",
    "axes[1].plot(np.arange(len(ts_lf.value))      / fs_seis, ts_lf.value,      lw=0.8, label=\"0.05–0.5 Hz\", color=\"C1\")\n",
    "axes[2].plot(np.arange(len(ts_hf.value))      / fs_seis, ts_hf.value,      lw=0.8, label=\"1–10 Hz\",    color=\"C2\")\n",
    "\n",
    "for ax in axes:\n",
    "    ax.set_ylabel(f\"[{ts_seismic.unit}]\")\n",
    "    ax.legend(loc=\"upper right\")\n",
    "    ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)\n",
    "axes[2].set_xlabel(\"時間 [s]\")\n",
    "fig.suptitle(\"地震データ: 帯域フィルタリング\")\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "cell-9",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-05T13:14:05.112166Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-05T13:14:05.112034Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-05T13:14:05.389474Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-05T13:14:05.389132Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x400 with 1 Axes>\n"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# 振幅スペクトル密度（ASD）\n",
    "asd = ts_seismic.asd(fftlength=10.0, overlap=0.5)\n",
    "\n",
    "fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 4))\n",
    "ax.loglog(asd.frequencies.value, asd.value)\n",
    "ax.set_xlabel(\"周波数 [Hz]\")\n",
    "ax.set_ylabel(f\"ASD [{asd.unit}]\")\n",
    "ax.set_title(\"地震 ASD\")\n",
    "ax.grid(True, which=\"both\", alpha=0.3)\n",
    "ax.axvline(0.15, color=\"C1\", linestyle=\"--\", label=\"0.15 Hz マイクロセイズム\")\n",
    "ax.axvline(1.0,  color=\"C2\", linestyle=\"--\", label=\"1.0 Hz ノイズ\")\n",
    "ax.legend()\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "cell-10",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 4. obspy に戻す変換"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 7,
   "id": "cell-11",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-05T13:14:05.391386Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-05T13:14:05.391266Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-05T13:14:05.395997Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-05T13:14:05.395489Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "obspy Trace に変換: .K1.KAGRA.00.BHZ.. | 2023-01-01T00:00:00.000000Z - 2023-01-01T00:00:59.990000Z | 100.0 Hz, 6000 samples\n",
      "to_obspy() 経由: .K1.KAGRA.00.BHZ.. | 2023-01-01T00:00:00.000000Z - 2023-01-01T00:00:59.990000Z | 100.0 Hz, 6000 samples\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "if OBSPY_AVAILABLE:\n",
    "    tr_filtered = ts_lf.to_obspy_trace()\n",
    "    print(\"obspy Trace に変換:\", tr_filtered)\n",
    "\n",
    "    from gwexpy.interop import to_obspy\n",
    "    tr_generic = to_obspy(ts_lf)\n",
    "    print(\"to_obspy() 経由:\", tr_generic)\n",
    "else:\n",
    "    print(\"obspy が利用できないため、ラウンドトリップ変換をスキップします\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 5. マルチチャンネル地震解析\n",
    "\n",
    "3 成分地震計（X, Y, Z）のように複数チャネルを同時に扱う場合は、`TimeSeriesMatrix` を使うと一括処理できます。\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 8,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x400 with 1 Axes>\n"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "from gwexpy.timeseries import TimeSeriesMatrix\n",
    "\n",
    "rng2 = np.random.default_rng(1)\n",
    "components = ['BHX', 'BHY', 'BHZ']\n",
    "data_3c = np.stack([\n",
    "    seis_data + 1e-8 * rng2.normal(0, 1, n_seis),\n",
    "    seis_data * 0.8 + 1e-8 * rng2.normal(0, 1, n_seis),\n",
    "    seis_data * 1.2 + 1e-8 * rng2.normal(0, 1, n_seis),\n",
    "], axis=0)[:, np.newaxis, :]\n",
    "\n",
    "tsm_3c = TimeSeriesMatrix(\n",
    "    data_3c,\n",
    "    dt=(1/fs_seis)*u.s,\n",
    "    t0=0*u.s,\n",
    "    units=np.full((3, 1), u.m/u.s),\n",
    ")\n",
    "tsm_3c.channel_names = components\n",
    "\n",
    "asd_3c = tsm_3c.asd(fftlength=10.0, overlap=0.5)\n",
    "\n",
    "fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 4))\n",
    "for i, comp in enumerate(components):\n",
    "    ax.loglog(asd_3c[i, 0].frequencies.value, asd_3c[i, 0].value, label=comp)\n",
    "ax.set_xlabel(\"周波数 [Hz]\")\n",
    "ax.set_ylabel(\"ASD [m/s/√Hz]\")\n",
    "ax.set_title(\"3成分地震計の ASD\")\n",
    "ax.legend()\n",
    "ax.grid(True, which=\"both\", alpha=0.3)\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "cell-12",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 6. 移行ガイド: obspy + numpy → gwexpy\n",
    "\n",
    "**移行前（obspy + scipy）:**\n",
    "```python\n",
    "import obspy\n",
    "from scipy import signal\n",
    "\n",
    "st = obspy.read(\"seismic.mseed\")\n",
    "tr = st[0]\n",
    "\n",
    "tr_bp = tr.copy().filter('bandpass', freqmin=0.1, freqmax=1.0)\n",
    "f, psd = signal.welch(tr.data, fs=tr.stats.sampling_rate, nperseg=1024)\n",
    "asd = np.sqrt(psd)   # 単位なし\n",
    "```\n",
    "\n",
    "**移行後（gwexpy）:**\n",
    "```python\n",
    "from gwexpy.timeseries import TimeSeries\n",
    "\n",
    "ts = TimeSeries.read(\"seismic.mseed\", format='miniseed')\n",
    "# または: ts = TimeSeries.from_obspy_trace(obspy.read(\"seismic.mseed\")[0])\n",
    "\n",
    "ts_bp = ts.bandpass(0.1, 1.0)\n",
    "asd   = ts.asd(fftlength=10.0, overlap=0.5)  # 単位・軸情報付き\n",
    "asd.plot()  # そのままプロット可能\n",
    "```"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "cell-13",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## まとめ\n",
    "\n",
    "| 操作 | gwexpy API |\n",
    "|------|------------|\n",
    "| MiniSEED 読み込み | `TimeSeries.read(path, format='miniseed')` |\n",
    "| SAC 読み込み | `TimeSeries.read(path, format='sac')` |\n",
    "| obspy Trace から変換 | `TimeSeries.from_obspy_trace(tr, unit=...)` |\n",
    "| obspy Trace に変換 | `ts.to_obspy_trace()` または `to_obspy(ts)` |\n",
    "| 帯域フィルタ | `ts.bandpass(fmin, fmax)` |\n",
    "| ASD | `ts.asd(fftlength=..., overlap=...)` |\n",
    "| スペクトログラム | `ts.spectrogram(stride=..., fftlength=...)` |\n",
    "\n",
    "**関連チュートリアル:**\n",
    "- [相互運用性の基礎](intro_interop.ipynb)\n",
    "- [カップリング関数解析](advanced_coupling.ipynb)"
   ]
  }
 ],
